message:
fix(node): deterministic hashing, JSON injection fix, and BTreeMap migration in API/connector/observability

Four modules hardened:

fleet_quarantine.rs:
- HashMap → BTreeMap migration for deterministic quarantine iteration.

golden_vectors.rs:
- HashMap → BTreeMap migration. SchemaCategory gains PartialOrd + Ord
  to support BTreeMap keying.

durability_violation.rs:
- Rewrite to_json() from manual format!() string interpolation to
  serde_json::json!() macro, fixing a class of JSON injection/escaping
  bugs when evidence_ref or failure_reason contain special characters.
- generate_bundle() now hashes evidence_ref, actual_hash, and
  failure_reason into bundle_id for content-addressable artifact
  identification. New tests for artifact hash sensitivity and JSON
  escape correctness including proof_context field.

repro_bundle_export.rs:
- Switch from DefaultHasher to sha2::Sha256 + serde_json for
  deterministic, cryptographic bundle hashing. DefaultHasher is not
  guaranteed stable across Rust versions; SHA-256 provides
  cross-version reproducibility for audit trail integrity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
